title: alchemilla hoppeana subsp. glacialis
intro: Alchemilla hoppeana subsp. glacialis, also known as Arctic Lady's Mantle, is a subspecies of perennial herb that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla hoppeana subsp. glacialis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
